basic_details.job_title: IGRUA Ground Instructor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indira Gandhi Rashtriya Uran Akademi (IGRUA) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 1 Ground Instructor (Air Regulations) Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their application via Email. The last date to send the application email is 13-05-2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 65 years as on 01-05-2026. Age relaxation rules are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: Post-Graduate degree in any discipline from recognized University; AND Held or holding CPL/ATPL; OR Air Traffic Controller from AAI/Defence Forces; OR Minimum 10 years professional experience in civil aviation regulatory domain, airline operations, or aviation safety management; AND Minimum 05 years teaching/instructional experience in aviation-related subjects at Flying Training Organisations (DGCA approved), Defence Aviation Training Establishments, Universities/Colleges offering aviation programmes, or AAI training centres
qualification.details: Post-Graduate degree in any discipline from a recognized University. AND Held or holding CPL/ATPL; OR Air Traffic Controller from AAI/Defence Forces; OR Minimum 10 years professional experience in civil aviation regulatory domain, airline operations, or aviation safety management. AND Minimum 05 years teaching/instructional experience in aviation-related subjects at Flying Training Organisations (DGCA approved), Defence Aviation Training Establishments, Universities/Colleges offering aviation programmes, or AAI training centres.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 13-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IGRUA Ground Instructor post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Ground Instructor (Air Regulations) post is 13th May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Ground Instructor position?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Ground Instructor (Air Regulations) post at Indira Gandhi Rashtriya Uran Akademi (IGRUA).

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Post-Graduate degree, along with CPL/ATPL or Air Traffic Controller experience, or significant professional and teaching experience in aviation.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the Ground Instructor role?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Ground Instructor (Air Regulations) position is 65 years as of 1st May 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Ground Instructor post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a fixed salary of Rs. 1,65,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for this recruitment must be submitted via Email.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The position of Ground Instructor (Air Regulations) is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q8. What are the selection stages for the IGRUA recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of applications followed by a written test and/or interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the Indira Gandhi Rashtriya Uran Akademi located?
faq.answer: Indira Gandhi Rashtriya Uran Akademi is located in Amethi, Uttar Pradesh, with the pincode 229302.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for any category of candidates.
